title: SQL: crash: select cast( 1 as varchar(10))
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, name String, value Float32);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'Test', 10.5);
SELECT CAST(value AS String) FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT CAST(1 AS String) UNION ALL SELECT CAST(2 AS String);
key_bug_features: select cast with varchar type conversion
